name: ET Superman: Wrath of Tyrannosaurus Rex
short_description: ET Superman: Wrath of Tyrannosaurus Rex is a sandbox action adventure game You will personally experience the intense process of being hunted by T-Rex, use your courage and resourcefulness, Avoid their hunting, collect batteries in the city as soon as possible, repair the aircraft and escape.
detailed_description:
Announcement:

June 11, 2023

Dear player friends

Thank you for your support of this game

Because sales are sluggish

This game is announced to be offline from now on

Thank you for your company

FreeCube


A genetically modified warrior with superpowers, a long-abandoned dinosaur park, a group of
The ferocious and brutal mutant Tyrannosaurus rex, the super soldier Ethan Pete arrived by various coincidences Dinosaur Park collects embryos of mutant Tyrannosaurus rex. He knew it was a near-death adventure, but He has no choice, as his super powers make him terminally ill, he has to deal with Rhodes Dinosaurs Cooperation (maker of mutant tyrannosaurus rex) to obtain dinosaur embryos, genes from these embryos Extracted gene fragments from Ethan Pitt's terminal illness.

In the game you will play super soldier Ethan Pete, after you collect Tyrannosaurus embryos,
The ambush of the Tyrannosaurus, the Tyrannosaurus is frantically searching for your whereabouts in the abandoned city, your only hope It is to find the aircraft backpack that the rescuers dropped in the city. But the aircraft backpack is falling During the process, it was accidentally destroyed by a pterosaur, and the aircraft and batteries were scattered all over the city. These batteries are collected one by one and put back into the aircraft in order to start the aircraft and escape there.



The game provides PC gamers with extensive customization options that you can set for each Tyrannosaurus Attributes, including its strength, speed, hunting methods, damage level, size, skin, and more. You can also set different weather for the scene, including sunny, rainy, rainy. through 50 Customization options You can set a different level of thrill and style for each game you will experience Incredibly thrilling adventure.


In the "Jurassic Park" and "Jurassic World" films, the survivors were hunted by the Tyrannosaurus rex The shocking, tense, thrilling and exciting scenes are impressive. This game attempts to You recreate the shock, tension, thrill, thrill, experience of being hunted by a Tyrannosaurus, All objects in a city, including buildings, have their own mass that can be Push down and move with force to show the powerful destructive power of Tyrannosaurus, and shocking disaster special effects. You have a lot of freedom and can go anywhere you want, but the tyrannosaurus also It will follow, bringing you unprecedented pressure. All large objects in the city are Cover your props. Use your wisdom and courage to avoid the pursuit of Tyrannosaurus The aircraft battery, and finally got on the aircraft and escaped successfully.

Features and content:


■ large city
In the plot, these buildings are models that the park presents to visitors, built with lightweight materials, The interior is hollow. In the game, Tyrannosaurus can easily tear down these buildings, but the main Angular can't do it. Large urban terrain 1000*1000 meters, construction area 800*800 meters, model Quantity 14000. All objects have their own mass, and mass is proportional to volume. adult Powerful Tyrannosaurus that can shake most large buildings. Due to the huge size of the Tyrannosaurus, the protagonist Walking in the cracks of the building can block the Tyrannosaurus more safely and temporarily trap it.

■ Ethan Pitt
His speed, skills, clothing can be configured.
Skills include object throwing, bomb throwing, and javelin throwing.

object throwing
After opening, the protagonist will have the ability to throw objects.
After an object hits the tyrannosaurus, the tyrannosaurus retreats for a period of time. the mass of the object The larger it is, the longer the tyrannosaurus retreats, with a maximum time of no more than 3 seconds.

bomb dropping
Bombs can be thrown forward, or they can be dropped backwards, and the explosion produced by the bomb Not only can it blow up surrounding objects, it can also make the Tyrannosaurus retreat for 1 second. There are up to 12 types of explosion effects for you to choose from.

javelin throw
When the javelin hits the tyrannosaurus body, it will make the tyrannosaurus retreat for 1 second. Hitting the Tyrannosaurus head will cause the Tyrannosaurus to retreat for 3 seconds.



■ Tyrannosaurus Rex
Configurable its, speed, strength, size, skin, hunt style, quantity,
etc. Up to 20 configurable properties.

How tyrannosaurs hunted their prey
Contains, fixed target pursuit, visual search, olfactory search. Three selectable modes

fixed target pursuit
The Tyrannosaurus will ignore any object's obstruction, and will always pursue the protagonist as the target.

visual manhunt
In this mode, the tyrannosaurus hunts for its prey visually, and when the tyrannosaurus sees the prey, it will hunt it down. If the prey suddenly disappeared from its sight, the tyrannosaurus recorded where the prey disappeared and where it went. Manhunt for a period of time, and if not found will be manhunted throughout the scene. Tyrannosaurus has a viewing angle of 200 degrees and a field of view radius of 2 kilometers. The protagonist hides from rocks, vehicles, etc. Behind large objects, it can effectively avoid the hunting of Tyrannosaurus.

olfactory hunt
In this mode, Tyrannosaurus hunts for prey with the cooperation of smell and vision.
When a tyrannosaurus is more than 200 meters away from its prey, it uses its sense of smell to detect its prey The approximate position of the tyrannosaurus and gradually approach the prey, when the tyrannosaurus is within 200 meters of the prey
, use the camera to hunt for prey.

■ head tracking
To make the T-Rex's movements more realistic when chasing prey, we've added head tracking. After it is turned on, Tyrannosaurus will always keep its eyes on the direction of the target. When the target becomes the protagonist and approachesWhen the protagonist is the protagonist, the Tyrannosaurus rex's mouth is more likely to touch and bite the protagonist, so the danger level will be higher when head tracking is turned on.

When it is turned off, the Tyrannosaurus Rex will trigger the bite action only when it is
ithin 20 meters of the protagonist, and the bite action will be activated.
It can be avoided, and the degree of danger is relatively low.

■ weather system
You can customize the weather for each game.
Including, sunny, rainy, rainy days.
Typhoon sound effects can also be added to enhance the atmosphere.
Rain is always accompanied by thunder, it can make
The game atmosphere is more tense and exciting.

Player custom content:


We have brought a wealth of customized content for players,
and you can play your imagination to your heart's content,
Create your own content.
Let your friends join in and share your creations.

■ custom mask
You can customize your favorite avatar and add it to the game. It is a PNG image and can have many layers.
is attached to the protagonist's head.

■ custom character dialogue
You can design your own character dialogue, and he will be dynamically displayed in the game in the form of subtitles.
You can also set the display time for each line of dialogue, as well as the time interval between dialogues.

■ random scene
The random map generated by the program takes about 1 minute to complete.
The infinite arrangement and combination of objects will bring you a lot of surprises.
You can save these scenes.
You can also edit all objects in the scene arbitrarily.

■ custom scene
Here you can edit any object you want.
You can move any object anywhere, move it, move it, copy it, rotate it, scale it, change its quality.
Any number of objects can be copied.
You can set properties of objects.
Including, physics objects affected by forces, meshes that do not contain colliders,
A static object that contains only colliders.
There are as many as 150 types of models in the scene, and you can use them to create the fantasy city in your heart.
Then, load the self-built scene and start a life-and-death escape adventure with the Tyrannosaurus Rex in the self-built world.


User manual is included in the game
Contains the description of the configuration item
Description of keyboard
How to create customized maps, etc
Players can set the game according to the instructions
